requirement: the format specification defines its terms before use

findings.observation: A dedicated Key Terms glossary defines Quality Model, Entity, Subject, Factor, Requirement, Finding, Assessment, Rating Scale, Rating Level, Rating Result, Target, and Source up front, before the normative sections use them.
Finer terms (sub-factor, primary/secondary factor, unlensed, local/aggregate/factor rating) are defined at first use within the relevant section.
Exception: 'the model-content group' is referenced as an implementation schema concept without being defined in the public spec.

rationale: Terms are systematically defined in an upfront glossary and at first use, satisfying define-before-use. One undefined reference ('model-content group') keeps it from outstanding.
